description: ML model loader using pickle - common pattern but known vulnerability

expected_analysis.correct_usage: Loading trusted ML models saved by the user themselves
expected_analysis.dangerous_usage: A malicious .pkl file can execute arbitrary code on load. If model files come from untrusted sources (user uploads, downloads), this is a remote code execution vulnerability.
expected_analysis.recommendation: Use safer serialization: safetensors, ONNX, or torch.load with weights_only=True. Add file integrity checks.
